# GrowHub Limited

> Build first, then talk. GrowHub is a Hong Kong-based software studio that
> starts every project with a zero-upfront-cost, AI-driven working prototype —
> then shapes the service around it: what problem it should solve and what it
> should become. It builds web apps & services, websites, and mobile apps.
> The site is available in English, Traditional Chinese (zh-HK), and Japanese.

## Company

- Legal name: GrowHub Limited (香港 / Hong Kong)
- Founder & CEO: Mika Nakamura (Carmen)
- Founded: 2019-04-17
- Location: 21/F., Kam Fung Commercial Building, 2-4 Tin Lok Lane, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
- Website: https://growhub.com.hk/

## Services

- Web Application & Service Development — scalable web apps and SaaS, from concept to launch.
- Website Production & Management — design, build, and post-launch operation & growth support.
- App Development — iOS / Android mobile apps, from UI/UX design to release and maintenance.
- AI-Driven Development — reshaping the development process with AI for more speed and higher quality; consulting and collaboration on adopting AI-driven workflows.

## How we work (prototype first)

1. Free consultation — no pitch deck needed.
2. AI-driven prototype at zero upfront cost (HK$0), typically within days.
3. Discuss over the working prototype to pin down the problem worth solving and the shape of the service.
4. Move into full development — flexible and fast (or simply stop, with no obligation).

## Tech stack

- Frontend: React, Next.js, Astro, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Node.js, Python, Go, REST / GraphQL, PostgreSQL
- Mobile: React Native, Swift, Kotlin, Flutter
- Cloud & DevOps: AWS, Cloudflare, Docker, CI/CD, Netlify
- AI: LLM integration, RAG, AI-assisted development, automation

- Home: https://growhub.com.hk/ (Traditional Chinese: /zh-hk/ , Japanese: /ja/)
